title: Utility Stocks' Q1 Earnings Due on May 2: WEC, OGS & More
text: Let's focus on utility stocks WEC, OGS, OTTR and AWR that are scheduled to release first-quarter earnings on May 2.

title: 4 Utility Stocks Likely to Beat Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Stable demand for utility services, new rates and systematic investments are set to aid utilities like AWK, WEC, OGS and D to beat first-quarter earnings estimates and provide high-quality services to customers.

title: Reasons to Add WEC Energy (WEC) to Your Portfolio Right Now
text: WEC Energy (WEC) makes a strong case for investment, given positive estimates movement and systematic capital investments to strengthen infrastructure and serve the expanding customer base.
